nasb.text: So then both he who gives his own virgin daughter in marriage does well, and he who does not give her in marriage will do better.

esv.text: So then he who marries his betrothed does well, and he who refrains from marriage will do even better.

cnv.text: 所以，那跟自己的女朋友結婚的，作得好，那不結婚的，作得更好。

ccb.text: 所以，与未婚妻完婚是对的，但不结婚则更好。

csbs.text: 所以，那让自己的童贞女儿结婚的，做得好；那没有让她结婚的，做得更好。
